# Cendorq

Cendorq is AI Engine Readiness for businesses that need to be easier for customers, search, and AI-powered discovery surfaces to understand, trust, compare, and choose.

## Primary conversion path

The strongest first action is the Free Scan when the readiness signal is unclear. The public path should stay focused: start free, compare readiness depth, then return to the protected dashboard when customer work exists.

- Scan: /free-check
- Readiness path: /plans
- Dashboard: /dashboard
- Review: /plans/deep-review
- Repair: /plans/build-fix
- Control: /plans/ongoing-control

## Route intent

- /: Focused homepage readiness path. The homepage should help the right customer understand what Cendorq is, why AI-readiness matters now, what it costs, and what to do next.
- /free-check: Guided Free Scan intake. This is the safest first signal before deeper spend.
- /plans: Plain-language comparison of Scan, Review, Repair, and Control.
- /dashboard: Protected customer readiness workspace for reports, proof, notifications, status, and next actions.
- /dashboard/reports: Protected readiness proof vault.
- /plans/deep-review: Review. Deeper AI Readiness Review for businesses that need to understand what is weakening clarity, trust, visibility, and choice.
- /plans/build-fix: Repair. Signal Repair for businesses ready to strengthen pages, message, proof, trust, and action path.
- /plans/ongoing-control: Control. Readiness Control for businesses that need recurring review, search/AI-change awareness, and monthly decision support.

## Positioning rules

Cendorq should be described in plain business language. Prefer:

- AI Engine Readiness
- Scan, Review, Repair, Control
- Free Scan
- AI Readiness Review
- Signal Repair
- Readiness Control
- readiness path
- readiness proof vault
- private readiness workspace
- make the business easier to find
- make the business easier to understand
- make the business easier to trust
- make the business easier to choose
- stop guessing before spending more
- protect decisions as search and AI discovery change

Do not use old internal labels, retired package names, or generic premium positioning in active public surfaces.

## Trust boundaries

Cendorq does not guarantee rankings, AI placement, revenue, leads, sales, or platform treatment. It improves business clarity, trust, decision quality, and the path a customer sees before they choose.
